input.content:
{
  "name": "habitude",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Habit tracking app with reminders and progress charts",
  "main": "dist/index.js",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "tsx watch src/index.ts",
    "build": "tsc --project tsconfig.json",
    "start": "node dist/index.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "cors": "^2.8.5",
    "dotenv": "^16.4.5",
    "express": "^4.19.2",
    "jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.2",
    "pg": "^8.12.0",
    "reflect-metadata": "^0.2.2",
    "typeorm": "^0.3.20"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/cors": "^2.8.17",
    "@types/express": "^4.17.21",
    "@types/jsonwebtoken": "^9.0.6",
    "@types/node": "^22.5.4",
    "tsx": "^4.19.1",
    "typescript": "^5.6.2"
  }
}
